name: nicecli
description: NiceCLI desktop shell with local Rust backend runtime

scripts.lint:host: npm run prepare:web && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test:host: npm run prepare:web && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.smoke:backend-host: npm run prepare:web && cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --smoke-backend-host
scripts.smoke:tray-host: npm run prepare:web && cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --smoke-tray-host
scripts.verify:host: npm run test:host && npm run smoke:backend-host
scripts.verify:host:tray: npm run verify:host && npm run smoke:tray-host

author: NiceCLI Contributors
